// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import scala.scalanative.unsafe.*
import scala.scalanative.libc.errno.errno
import scala.scalanative.reflect.annotation.EnableReflectiveInstantiation
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativePtr, StructAbiCheck}

@EnableReflectiveInstantiation final class MultiValueBindingsImpl extends MultiValueBindings:
    import `MultiValueBindings$externs` as ext

    def readInto(fd: Int, buf: Buffer[Byte])(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): kyo.Fiber.Unsafe[kyo.example.golden.ReadResult, Any] =
        kyo.ffi.internal.BlockingBridge.run {
            Zone.acquire { implicit z =>
                val bufPtr = kyo.ffi.internal.FfiUnsafe.expect[NativePtr](buf.raw.asInstanceOf[AnyRef], classOf[NativePtr], "NativePtr on Native", "kyo.example.MultiValueBindings", "readInto").ptr
                val eofOut = alloc[CInt](1)
                val retVal = ext.read_into(fd, bufPtr, eofOut)
                kyo.example.golden.ReadResult(retVal, !eofOut != 0)
            }
        }
end MultiValueBindingsImpl

object MultiValueBindingsImpl:
    import scala.scalanative.unsafe.*
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.MultiValueBindings")
end MultiValueBindingsImpl

@extern
@link("kyo_mv")
private[example] object `MultiValueBindings$externs`:
    @blocking def read_into(fd: CInt, buf: Ptr[Byte], eofOut: Ptr[CInt]): CInt = extern
end `MultiValueBindings$externs`
